hero.title: UI/UX Design
hero.subtitle: Interfaces people actually use
hero.description: Research-led design, product flows, and visual systems built for clarity, conversion, and the real contexts founders are shipping into.

caseStudiesDescription: Proof from product design systems, interface builds, and visual language work shipped for founders who care about how things feel.

caseStudies.title: Matrimandir
caseStudies.description: Designed a contemplative digital presence for the iconic Auroville meditation center — balancing sacred depth with accessible clarity.
outcomes: Designed a contemplative presence balancing sacred depth with accessibility.
Created navigation guiding visitors through multiple levels of experience.
Delivered a visual language that felt quiet, intentional, and culturally resonant.
Made information about visiting and programs easier to discover.

proofPoints.title: Contemplative design language
proofPoints.description: Delivered a visual system that felt quiet, intentional, and aligned with the center's spiritual character.

proofPoints.title: Layered navigation clarity
proofPoints.description: Created a navigation structure that guided visitors through multiple levels of experience without friction.

proofPoints.title: Accessible information architecture
proofPoints.description: Made visiting information and programs significantly easier to discover across device types.

testimonial.quote: The design gave the space a digital presence that felt as considered as the place itself. Visitors could finally feel the quality of the experience before arriving.

caseStudies.title: Buglerock
caseStudies.description: Designed the product identity and interface architecture for a music-driven platform connecting artists, venues, and event creators.
outcomes: Defined a product identity making the platform's value immediately legible.
Designed an interface reducing friction for artists, venues, and creators.
Built a design system that accelerated the team's development cycles.
Improved onboarding completion through clearer user flow design.

proofPoints.title: Clear product identity
proofPoints.description: Defined a product identity that made the platform's value immediately legible to artists, venues, and creators.

proofPoints.title: Reduced onboarding friction
proofPoints.description: Improved onboarding completion through clearer user flows and a more coherent interface hierarchy.

proofPoints.title: Scalable design system
proofPoints.description: Built a design system that accelerated development cycles and kept the product consistent as it grew.

testimonial.quote: The design system gave us a foundation we could ship from faster. The product finally looked and felt like the platform it was meant to be.

caseStudies.title: Prakiti Sattva
caseStudies.description: Built an Ayurvedic wellness brand's digital touchpoints around a natural design system that made product trust visible.
outcomes: Built a natural design system making product trust visible before purchase.
Improved conversion paths through cleaner product discovery flows.
Designed assets that cohered into a single brand experience.
Helped communicate Ayurvedic credibility to modern wellness buyers.

proofPoints.title: Trust-first design system
proofPoints.description: Built a natural visual language that communicated product credibility before the buyer reached the cart.

proofPoints.title: Cleaner discovery flows
proofPoints.description: Improved conversion paths by reducing friction in product browsing and category navigation.

proofPoints.title: Cohesive brand experience
proofPoints.description: Designed assets that cohered into a single, consistent brand presence across the wellness platform.

testimonial.quote: The design made our Ayurvedic credentials feel accessible without losing authenticity. Buyers could see the quality before they'd even read a label.

caseStudies.title: General Aeronautics
caseStudies.description: Redesigned the product messaging and visual hierarchy across a complex multi-product platform to improve navigability and trust.
outcomes: Reframed a broad drone portfolio into a sharper market story.
Made technical capabilities easier for non-technical audiences to understand.
Improved credibility across web, applications, and communication assets.
Built a stronger platform for future product and growth decisions.

proofPoints.title: Sharpened market story
proofPoints.description: Turned a complex product portfolio into a clearer business narrative that buyers and partners could understand and trust faster.

proofPoints.title: Unified touchpoints
proofPoints.description: Aligned website, product UX, and supporting communication assets into one more coherent system.

proofPoints.title: Built for scale
proofPoints.description: Created a stronger platform for future launches, campaigns, and product communication decisions.

testimonial.quote: The work made a technically complex drone business easier to understand and easier to trust. Website, product UX, and supporting assets finally reinforced the same story instead of fragmenting it.

caseStudies.title: Bevikve
caseStudies.description: Designed the core product UI and onboarding flows for a B2B platform built around operational clarity and team workflows.
outcomes: Reduced onboarding time through cleaner flow design and task sequencing.
Designed a UI making complex B2B workflows visually navigable.
Improved team adoption rates by prioritizing clarity over feature density.
Created a component system ready to scale with the product roadmap.

caseStudies.title: KittyKat
caseStudies.description: Designed the visual language and production system that turned AI-generated assets into a repeatable creative engine for campaigns.
outcomes: Built a production system turning AI assets into campaign-ready creatives.
Reduced creative turnaround time from days to hours.
Established a visual language keeping AI-generated assets brand-consistent.
Created a scalable system usable across multiple campaigns and channels.

proofPoints.title: Automated product-to-model generation
proofPoints.description: Turned product photos into model visuals through a faster AI-led production workflow.

proofPoints.title: Improved realism and quality
proofPoints.description: Used data preprocessing and hierarchical refinement to improve proportion accuracy and premium visual output.

proofPoints.title: Scaled brand visual production
proofPoints.description: Reduced image creation time and made it easier to produce larger volumes of usable campaign assets.

testimonial.quote: The value of the work was not just faster image generation. It was building an AI visual pipeline that improved realism, reduced production delay, and made large-scale branded output far more usable.

services.title: Product Design
services.description: End-to-end UX from discovery to polished interface, built around how your users actually make decisions and take action.

services.title: Design Systems
services.description: Build a visual language and component library that makes your product faster to ship and consistent to trust across every surface.

services.title: User Research
services.description: Structured discovery sessions, prototype testing, and insight synthesis that reduce the guesswork in every product decision.

services.title: Prototyping & Flows
services.description: High-fidelity prototypes and interaction flows that prove ideas before engineering begins — so no sprint starts on a bad assumption.
